title: ZIPPER: Coney Island's Last Wild Ride
original_title: Zipper: Coney Island's Last Wild Ride
overview: When his rented lot is snatched up by an opportunistic real estate mogul, Eddie Miranda and his Coney Island ride the Zipper become casualties of a power struggle between the developer and the City of New York over the future of the world-famous destination.
